stemHtml: What is an "ARINC 424 Path Terminator" in reference to Performance Based Navigation?

options.a: It is the point at which an RNAV specification segment of a procedure changes to a different RNAV or RNP specification.
options.b: It is the point at which an RNAV specification segment of a procedure changes to an RNP specification.
options.c: It is the point at which an RNAV specification segment of a procedure changes to another RNAV specification.
options.d: It is a code that defines a specific type of flight path along a segment of a procedure and a specific type of termination of that flight path.
